# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: google-cloud-storage
    location: global
    version: '301.0.0'

params:
  project_id: your-project-id

properties:
  cf_backupBucketName: backups

outputs:
  backupBucketName:
    value: ${{ params.project_id }}-${{ properties.cf_backupBucketName }}-backup

main:
  - function: CreateBucket
    name: CreateBackupBucket
    parameters:
      projectId: ${{ params.project_id }}
      bucketName: ${{ outputs.backupBucketName }}
